MUST: TutorRegistrationForm MUST validate email uniqueness via clean_email() (RF-002)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST limit subject selection to maximum 5 via clean_subjects() (RF-004)
TutorRegistrationForm.save() MUST set user_type='tutor' and username=email (RF-002)
TutorRegistrationForm.save() MUST create TutorProfile and assign subjects via ManyToMany (RF-004)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST use explicit Meta.fields — MUST NOT use '__all__' (RNF-002)
MUST_NOT: TutorRegistrationForm MUST NOT allow duplicate emails (RF-002)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST NOT allow more than 5 subjects (RF-004)
TutorRegistrationForm MUST NOT set user_type outside 'tutor' (RF-002)

MUST: ClientRegistrationForm MUST validate email uniqueness via clean_email() (RF-002)
ClientRegistrationForm MUST require parent_name when is_minor=True via clean() (RF-003, RNF-008)
ClientRegistrationForm.save() MUST set user_type='client' and username=email (RF-002)
ClientRegistrationForm.save() MUST create ClientProfile with is_minor and parent_name (RF-003)
MUST_NOT: ClientRegistrationForm MUST NOT allow minor registration without parent_name (RF-003, RNF-008)
ClientRegistrationForm MUST NOT set user_type outside 'client' (RF-002)

MUST: Both forms MUST validate email uniqueness excluding current user via clean_email() (RF-002)
TutorProfileEditForm MUST validate hourly_rate is non-negative and <= 9999 (RF-004)
Both forms MUST use explicit Meta.fields (RNF-002)
Both forms.save() MUST update User.email when changed (RF-002)
MUST_NOT: Forms MUST NOT allow email update to address used by another user (RF-002)
Forms MUST NOT expose fields beyond defined Meta.fields (RNF-002)
